user_request: Prepare a detailed plaint for recovery of Rs.15,00,000/- advanced as a hand loan by bank transfer. There is no written agreement. The transaction is supported by bank statement and WhatsApp communications. The Defendant has failed to repay despite repeated oral demands and legal notice. Plead limitation properly. Claim interest at 12% per annum from date of loan till realization. Draft strictly in accordance with Order VII CPC. Include proper cause of action, jurisdiction, valuation, court fee and prayer clause. Use formal Indian court language suitable for filing before City Civil Court, Bengaluru.

Notice sent to the Defendant demanding repayment
evidence.relevance: Proof of demand prior to filing suit

would amount to hampering access to justice. The reliefs sought is barred by law being directly hit by the provisions

sue for a declaration.

draft_artifacts.title: Plaint for Recovery of Money (Hand Loan)
draft_artifacts.text:
IN THE CITY CIVIL COURT AT BENGALURU

REGULAR CIVIL SUIT NO. ____ OF 20__

BETWEEN:
{{PLAINTIFF_NAME}}
{{PLAINTIFF_DESCRIPTION}}
{{PLAINTIFF_ADDRESS}}
									PLAINTIFF

AND

{{DEFENDANT_NAME}}
{{DEFENDANT_DESCRIPTION}}
{{DEFENDANT_ADDRESS}}
									DEFENDANT

			SUIT FOR RECOVERY OF MONEY

The Plaintiff submits as follows:

1. That the Plaintiff is a {{PLAINTIFF_OCCUPATION}}, aged {{PLAINTIFF_AGE}} years, residing at {{PLAINTIFF_ADDRESS}} and is competent to file this Suit.

2. That the Defendant is a {{DEFENDANT_OCCUPATION}}, aged {{DEFENDANT_AGE}} years, residing at {{DEFENDANT_ADDRESS}}. The Defendant is personally known to the Plaintiff and is solvent and amenable to the jurisdiction of this Hon'ble Court.

3. That on or about {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, at Bengaluru, the Plaintiff advanced a hand loan of Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only) to the Defendant. The said amount was transferred by the Plaintiff to the Defendant's bank account via electronic bank transfer, particulars whereof are detailed in Annexure-A annexed hereto. The said loan was advanced on the basis of an oral agreement between the parties, as there was no written agreement executed in respect thereof.

4. That it was orally agreed between the parties that the Defendant would repay the said principal amount of Rs. 15,00,000/- together with interest thereon at the rate of 12% per annum from the date of the loan until the date of realization.

5. That despite the Defendant having availed the said loan and being liable to repay the same, the Defendant has failed and neglected to repay the principal amount or any interest thereon despite repeated oral demands made by the Plaintiff from time to time, the last such demand having been made on or about {{DATE_OF_DEMAND}}.

6. That the Plaintiff, through his Advocates, caused a legal notice dated {{DATE_OF_LEGAL_NOTICE}} to be issued to the Defendant demanding repayment of the said loan amount with interest within fifteen days of receipt thereof. A true copy of the said legal notice along with proof of service is annexed hereto and marked as Annexure-C. The Defendant received the said notice but failed and neglected to comply with the lawful demands contained therein.

7. That the WhatsApp communications exchanged between the parties, copies whereof are annexed hereto and marked as Annexure-B, corroborate the existence of the loan transaction and the subsequent demands for repayment.

8. That the cause of action for filing this Suit first arose on {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, when the loan amount was advanced and the Defendant became liable to repay the same. The right to sue accrued on {{DATE_OF_CAUSE_OF_ACTION_ACCRUAL}} when the Defendant failed to repay the amount despite demand. The present Suit is being instituted within the prescribed period of three years from the date of accrual of the right to sue, in accordance with the provisions of the Limitation Act, 1963.

9. That this Hon'ble Court has jurisdiction to entertain this Suit as the Defendant resides within the jurisdiction of this Court and/or the cause of action wholly or partly arose at Bengaluru within the jurisdiction of this Court. The subject-matter of the Suit is valued at Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only) besides interest and costs for the purpose of jurisdiction and court fees.

10. That the court fee paid is {{COURT_FEE_AMOUNT}} computed in accordance with the Karnataka Court-fees and Suits Valuation Act, 1958.

11. That no suit for the same cause of action is pending between the same parties in any other Court.

PRAYER:

WHEREFORE, it is most respectfully prayed that this Hon'ble Court may be pleased to:

(a) Pass a decree for a sum of Rs. 15,00,000/- (Rupees Fifteen Lakhs only) together with interest thereon at the rate of 12% per annum from {{DATE_OF_LOAN}} till the date of realization against the Defendant;

(b) Pass a decree for costs of this Suit;
(c) Pass a decree for pendente lite and future interest as may be deemed fit;
(d) Grant such other relief or reliefs as this Hon'ble Court may deem fit and proper in the facts and circumstances of the case.

Place: Bengaluru
Date: {{DATE_OF_FILING}}

									ADVOCATE FOR PLAINTIFF

VERIFICATION:

I, {{PLAINTIFF_NAME}}, do hereby verify that the contents of paragraphs 1 to 6, 8, 9 and 10 are true to my personal knowledge and the contents of paragraphs 7 and 11 are based on legal advice and believed to be true.

Verified on this ____ day of ________, 20__ at Bengaluru.

									PLAINTIFF

LIST OF DOCUMENTS (ANNEXURES):

1. Annexure-A: Copy of Bank Statement showing transfer of Rs. 15,00,000/-.
2. Annexure-B: Printed copies of WhatsApp communications between the parties.
3. Annexure-C: Copy of the Legal Notice dated {{DATE_OF_LEGAL_NOTICE}} along with proof of service.

blocking_issues.issue: Mandatory party identification details contain placeholders instead of specific information required under Order VII Rule 1 CPC
blocking_issues.fix: Replace all placeholders in party description paragraphs (PLAINTIFF_NAME, DEFENDANT_NAME, PLAINTIFF_ADDRESS, DEFENDANT_ADDRESS, PLAINTIFF_AGE, DEFENDANT_AGE, etc.) with actual factual details before filing; the Court requires specific names and addresses for proper issuance of summons

blocking_issues.issue: Unsupported factual statement regarding defendant's financial solvency
blocking_issues.fix: Remove the assertion that defendant is 'solvent' or replace with factual basis such as 'appears to be possessed of sufficient means' only if supported by evidence; alternatively use placeholder {{DEFENDANT_SOLVENCY_BASIS}} to be verified

non_blocking_issues.issue: Cause of action described as first arising on loan date rather than date of demand for demand loan
non_blocking_issues.fix: Clarify in Paragraph 8 that while the loan was advanced on {{DATE_OF_LOAN}}, the cause of action (right to sue) accrued specifically on {{DATE_OF_CAUSE_OF_ACTION_ACCRUAL}} being the date when oral demand was made and defendant failed to repay, as limitation for demand loans runs from date of demand under Article 5 of Limitation Act, 1963

non_blocking_issues.issue: Verification attributes WhatsApp communications to legal advice rather than personal knowledge
non_blocking_issues.fix: Amend verification to state that contents of paragraph 7 regarding WhatsApp communications are true to personal knowledge as plaintiff participated in said communications, not based on legal advice

unsupported_statements.reason: No factual information provided in FACTS, EVIDENCE or SLOTS regarding defendant's financial status, assets, or ability to pay debts
